hero.art_prompt: Karan, a 19 year old Indian commerce student in smart-casual, confident, studying global finance on a laptop with a subtle international feel, modern home, aspirational.

panels.narration: Karan wanted a finance career without borders.
panels.img_prompt: Karan, 19, confidently studying global finance on a laptop at home, curious and ambitious, modern room.

panels.narration: But a plain degree felt too local for his dream.
panels.img_prompt: Karan looking thoughtful, wondering how to build an international finance career, a laptop open, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a B.Com integrated with ACCA, UK.
panels.img_prompt: Karan's face lighting up with excitement at a laptop showing a B.Com accredited by ACCA UK, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: He enrolled and began building a global edge.
panels.img_prompt: Karan confidently starting his first international finance lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why A B.Com With ACCA, UK
points: Master global finance, IFRS and international accounting on an ACCA-aligned syllabus.
Earn a globally recognised edge, accredited by ACCA, UK, alongside your degree.
All at the same affordable fee: ₹1,35,000 for the full 3-year B.Com (₹45,000/year), with 0% interest EMI.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ B.Com, with the added global weight of ACCA.

testimonials.name: Karan Rao
testimonials.quote: I wanted a borderless finance career. An ACCA-integrated B.Com made that possible from day one.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: The ACCA-aligned syllabus and IFRS made me ready for global finance roles.

testimonials.name: Aman Gupta
testimonials.quote: A globally accredited degree at the same affordable fee. That felt like a genuine head start.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A globally recognised B.Com got me noticed for international finance roles.
